what_it_does: Placeholder file that preserves the otherwise empty company/nodes directory under Git version control.
observations: No code, configuration, or documentation present
conventions: Uses the common Git convention of a .gitkeep file to track an empty directory
notes: This is an empty .gitkeep file whose only role is to ensure the company/nodes directory is tracked by Git.
questions: What is intended to populate the nodes directory in the future?
intention_signals: Reserve the nodes directory as a structural mount point so it survives checkout and tooling can rely on its existence.
contribution: Keeps the nodes directory present in a fresh checkout, supporting any tooling or conventions that expect the path to exist.
summary_for_embedding: Empty .gitkeep file in company/nodes that keeps the otherwise empty directory under version control.
intention_for_embedding: Preserve the company/nodes directory in Git as a structural placeholder.
